description: Create a comprehensive GitHub Actions workflow named CI that runs on pushes to main and develop branches, on pull requests, and on a schedule. The workflow should run on multiple jobs with different environments including ubuntu-latest, macos-13, and windows-latest, and test the repository with various Python versions, including 3.10, 3.11, and 3.12. For each job, check out the repository, set up Python, cache dependencies, install dependencies, run tests with tox, and upload coverage to Codecov.
